nasb.text: It was Hezekiah who stopped the upper outlet of the waters of Gihon and directed them to the west side of the city of David. And Hezekiah prospered in all that he did.

esv.text: This same Hezekiah closed the upper outlet of the waters of Gihon and directed them down to the west side of the city of David. And Hezekiah prospered in all his works.

cnv.text: 這希西家堵塞了基訓泉上游的水，引水直下，流到大衛城的西邊。希西家所行的一切事，盡都亨通。

ccb.text: 他截断基训的上泉，将水引到大卫城的西边。希西迦凡事亨通。
